doc_title: Ibuprofen Toxicity in Dogs — ASPCA Animal Poison Control
label: fabricated
reason: The document claims to be a "Standard Veterinary Toxicology Reference" jointly authored by the ASPCA and AVMA, a publication title that does not exist in their official archives.
